task_text: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

next_step.current_state: Starting identity bootstrap per instructions before task-specific work.
next_step.observation: No sandbox tool has been executed yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Tree completed; now performing rulebook bootstrap read at repository root.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Open next inbox note and process per workflow
next_step.observation: The root tree shows a top-level rulebook file named AGENTS.MD and an inbox note at 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.

next_step.current_state: Root rulebook read successfully; completing identity bootstrap with context call.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Inspect system workflows required before task work
Read inbox note and execute requested action
next_step.observation: Read AGENTS.MD and found instruction to inspect 99_system/ and read relevant workflow docs before task work.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (root AGENTS + context). Per rulebook, must inspect 99_system before task work.
Inspected 99_system tree; now reading nested rulebook for this folder before selecting workflow.
next_step.observation: The 99_system folder contains workflows including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: Read system lane rulebook; entering workflows folder requires nested AGENTS before workflow content.
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD states schemas define shapes and workflows define how to act.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index read; now loading the specific inbox-processing workflow before acting on inbound note.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Execute required updates and report completion
next_step.observation: 99_system/workflows/AGENTS.MD directs using process-next-inbox-item.md when tasks route through inbox processing.

next_step.current_state: Loaded process-next-inbox workflow and security skill reminder; next step is reading the actual inbox item to determine task and threat signals.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Act or refuse based on verified evidence
next_step.observation: process-next-inbox-item.md instructs selecting the lowest inbox filename and reading it before taking action.

next_step.current_state: Inbox task requests OCR/frontmatter migration on a finance invoice; need additional required workflow/schema and lane rules before mutating files.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read OCR/migration workflows and finance schema
Read target invoice and apply focused frontmatter update, then delete processed inbox item
next_step.observation: The inbox note requests adding YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_13__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md while preserving existing body.

next_step.current_state: Inbox lane rules read; task is OCR/metadata migration so required system workflow docs must be loaded before editing.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read migrate-records-to-frontmatter workflow and finance schema
Read finance lane rules and target invoice file
next_step.observation: 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD says to delete the inbox file only after fully completing the request.

next_step.current_state: OCR workflow confirms extraction into frontmatter; now loading migration workflow for preservation constraints.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read finance lane AGENTS and target invoice
next_step.observation: 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md defines OCR as extracting visible note data into YAML frontmatter per schema.

next_step.current_state: Need exact field list from finance schema before editing invoice record.
next_step.observation: migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md requires using exact schema fields and preserving existing note body unchanged beneath frontmatter.

next_step.current_state: Schema loaded; before editing invoice in finance lane I must read nested AGENTS files in relevant folders.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read target invoice and perform focused migration
next_step.observation: finance-record-frontmatter.md defines required invoice fields including record_type, invoice_number, alias, issued_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, and lines.

next_step.current_state: Need invoices subfolder rulebook before touching target invoice file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter-preserving update and then delete processed inbox item
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD emphasizes exactness and preserving original body while using schema-defined frontmatter for OCR/normalization.

next_step.current_state: All required guidance loaded; now extracting visible invoice data from the target note.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write YAML frontmatter plus unchanged original body
Delete processed inbox file and report completion
next_step.observation: 50_finance/invoices/AGENTS.MD reinforces exact date/identity handling for invoice records.

next_step.current_state: Have all required data and rules; proceeding with focused migration write. Switching leaning to OUTCOME_OK to allow mutation.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to target invoice preserving full original body verbatim
next_step.observation: The target invoice note contains complete values for all required invoice schema fields and two line items totaling 600 EUR.

function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0009
alias: helios_discovery_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-13
total_eur: 600
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 420
    line_eur: 420
  - item: follow-up findings memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Helios discovery and workflow mapping invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0009                       |
| alias          | helios_discovery_invoice       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-13                     |
| total_eur      | 600                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 1   | 420      | 420      |
| 2 | follow-up findings memo           | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 600      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older consulting invoice that Miles would scan when the Helios lane becomes formal enough to track properly.

next_step.current_state: Frontmatter migration write succeeded on target invoice. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox item (already read).
next_step.observation: Wrote updated invoice file with YAML frontmatter and preserved original note body below it.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed inbox request, migrated invoice note to schema-compliant frontmatter while preserving body verbatim, then removed processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after completing the requested migration.

function.message: Processed the next inbox note and completed the requested OCR/frontmatter migration for `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_13__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md`. Added invoice YAML frontmatter per schema, preserved the full existing note body below the frontmatter unchanged, and deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system workflows before task work, used OCR and migration workflows plus finance schema, preserved original body verbatim, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on the specified invoice. The invoice note contained all required invoice fields and line items, enabling exact schema-compliant frontmatter without guessing. Workspace mutation was limited to the target invoice update and inbox file deletion per inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write migrated frontmatter to target invoice note
